description: Central registry of claim phrases distinguishing forbidden positive overclaims from allowed negated boundary phrases. Used to guide PR wording, docs, reports, and code. Not an automated runtime scanner — wording policy source of truth.
allowed_negated_phrases: not specific external app integration proof
not hidden tool execution authority proof
report_wording_patterns: consolidated proof governance local receipt only
pr_body_wording_patterns: Consolidated proof governance local receipt only. Candidate-only. Local-only.
Not production readiness. Not release certification.
doc_wording_patterns: This is a local receipt only.

context_aware_rules.scripts_and_code: strict — no positive overclaim phrases; negated boundary phrases are required
context_aware_rules.docs: allow negated boundary phrases; forbid positive overclaim phrases
context_aware_rules.examples: safe placeholders only; must include claim_boundary and candidate_only
context_aware_rules.reports: allow negated boundary phrases; require not_proven and proof_boundaries sections
context_aware_rules.pr_bodies: require proof boundary summary; allow scoped positive phrases for local-only results
